llm_metadata.command_shape: timeout 300 hermes chat -Q --provider copilot -m gpt-5.5 --source tool -t safe -q '<strict-json-prompt>'

packet_candidates.caveat_text: Frame narrowly: OpenClaw documentation names Hermes in migration/setup tooling contexts; do not state that Hermes is a runtime dependency or general operating environment without additional sources.
citation_requirements: Any later use must cite the persisted rereview note, source review, manifest item, candidate source identifiers, and Run 15/Run 16 provenance paths.
Any later use must preserve the required caveat exactly or more conservatively.
Do not cite this packet as evidence of runtime dependency, general operating environment, web access, or phone access requirements.
do_not_say: Do not say Hermes is a runtime dependency of OpenClaw.
Do not say Hermes is the general operating environment for OpenClaw.
Do not say OpenClaw requires Hermes for web or phone access.
Do not generalize beyond migration/setup/import tooling contexts unless additional sources support it.
Do not use this packet as a factual claim without the caveat.
Do not use this packet for chapter prose before later author/red-team gates pass.
packet_candidates.evidence_narrowness_warning: Evidence supports only a narrow documentation-context caveat about Hermes being named in OpenClaw migration/setup tooling contexts; it does not support broader dependency, runtime, access, or operating-environment claims.
limitations: Singleton cluster based on one downstream-eligible persisted rereview note.
Sources are documentation summaries for migration and setup only.
The evidence does not establish execution-environment status, dependency requirements, or general Hermes Agent runtime integration.
Not suitable for chapter prose, claim insertion, publication, or narrative packet creation.
packet_candidates.packet_angle: Track as a caveat-only planning packet about narrow Hermes mentions in OpenClaw migration/setup documentation, not as a dependency or runtime claim.
packet_candidates.packet_summary: Caveat-only planning packet from a singleton cluster: OpenClaw docs name Hermes in migration/setup tooling contexts only.
required_caveats: Frame narrowly: OpenClaw documentation names Hermes in migration/setup tooling contexts; do not state that Hermes is a runtime dependency or general operating environment without additional sources.
packet_candidates.residual_risk: Low to moderate if preserved as advisory caveat-only material; high if converted into a broader runtime, dependency, access, or operating-environment claim.
packet_candidates.title: Caveat-only Hermes/OpenClaw setup context

do_not_say: Hermes is a runtime dependency of OpenClaw.
Hermes is the general operating environment for OpenClaw.
The documentation proves broad Hermes Agent runtime integration.
